sourcesContent: import React from 'react' import { Box, Button, Image, Text, Drawer, DrawerOverlay, DrawerCloseButton, useDisclosure, DrawerContent, DrawerHeader, Input, DrawerBody, DrawerFooter } from "@chakra-ui/react" import { HamburgerIcon } from '@chakra-ui/icons' import img from '../Assets/background.jpg' function DrawerExample() { const { isOpen, onOpen, onClose } = useDisclosure() const btnRef = React.useRef() return ( <> Create your account ) } const Home = () => { return ( <> Thomas Villaverde Full Stack Developer ) } export default Home
